title: About Mind Centre for Learning
introduction: At Mind Centre, we believe every student has the potential to excel. Our proven methodologies, backed by brain research, help students learn faster and more effectively.
mission: To empower students with effective learning strategies that build confidence, improve grades, and foster a lifelong love of learning.
vision: Mind Centre is driven by a vision to use our mind-focused Brain research Fast & Systematic and Testing methodologies to help students unleash their potential and gain victory over their studies. To be Singapore's leading tuition centre known for innovative teaching methods and consistent student success.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for the highest standards in education and student support.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We continuously improve our teaching methods based on the latest educational research.

values.title: Care
values.description: We genuinely care about each student's academic and personal growth.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We maintain the highest ethical standards in all our interactions.

achievements: Over 20 years of excellence in education
Thousands of students helped to achieve their goals
Proven track record in PSLE, O-Level, and A-Level excellence
Specialized programs for IP and IB students
foundersMessage: David was a Singapore government scholar graduating from the University of Manchester, UK, with a B.Sc. in Mechanical Engineering with First Class Honours. As a reward for good work performance, a postgraduate scholarship was awarded to him to study in the USA, graduating with an M.Sc in Operations Research. In addition, his teaching qualification via a Graduate Diploma in Teaching from the University of Auckland, NZ, has enabled him to teach many primary, secondary and college students in school.

Violet holds a B.Sc. majoring in Chemistry and Biochemistry from the NUS, an MBA from Golden Gate University, USA, as well as an Advanced Certificate in TEFL for English language teaching. After working for a period of time in MNCs, she moved on to teaching at the Singapore Polytechnic as well as guiding primary, secondary and JC students to achieve their maximum potential through private tuition. For the past over 10 years, many groups of students have achieved success under her guidance, some of which have stayed on with her from primary to JC level!
